title: GPU eig (non-symmetric) via cuSOLVER geev
description: Spun out from #604 partial close. Need device-resident gpu_eig_f32/f64 wrapping cusolverDnSgeev / cusolverDnDgeev. Outputs are complex (eigenvalues are complex even for real inputs); follow the [n, 2] / [n, n, 2] convention from linalg.rs. Mirrors torch.linalg.eig.
